data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: While the evidence indicates that a unique Zoom meeting link is generated for each appointment, it does not provide sufficient details to confirm that the link is indeed unique per meeting in terms of security. Specifically, the evidence does not explicitly state that the link expires after the meeting or that it is never reused, which are critical components of the requirement. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage regarding the security aspect of the unique link per meeting.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the unique link expires after the meeting and is never reused.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify link expiration and reusability
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check that the meeting link is expired after the meeting ends and cannot be reused.
